live_call_layer.stack: Matrix-compatible voice/video through the CallChat homeserver, local MatrixRTC authorization, and a self-hosted LiveKit SFU
live_call_layer.transport_security: WebRTC DTLS-SRTP plus Matrix device/account identity controls

q_call_layer.scope: Owner-controlled MatrixRTC, self-hosted LiveKit, Matrix device identity, DTLS-SRTP, TURN, frame encryption, and licensed Shield policy where enabled
q_call_layer.user_experience: The hosted client presents verified call and Shield status without exposing recovery or media-key implementation details.

qpu_factor.classification: Separately licensed provider workflow; not QKD or quantum cryptography
qpu_factor.public_boundary: Implementation, derivation, recovery, and entitlement details are not published in the community repository.

provider_boundary: No AI or quantum provider should receive Matrix keys, recovery material, protected plaintext, or final local content keys.
Optional provider work remains separate from the deployed MatrixRTC and LiveKit media-encryption foundation.
